top_signals.title: Trump’s U-turn on Iran sanctions would unravel decades of curbs
top_signals.summary: Iran is one of the most sanctioned nations on Earth but Washington is attempting a stunning reversal to open the Strait of Hormuz, lower energy prices and end its unpopular war.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.
